# KirokuFlow｜紀錄流

KirokuFlow｜紀錄流 是一套面向台灣與日本市場的輕量行政與經費流程管理工具，協助會議、委員會、學校計畫、研究補助、協會活動與專案型工作建立可追蹤、可交接、可稽核的數位流程。

Primary pages:
- /ja
- /zh-TW
- /ja/blog
- /zh-TW/blog
- /ja/templates
- /ja/contact

Pillar pages:
- /ja/backoffice-dx-guide
- /ja/audit-trail-guide
- /ja/subsidy-management-guide
- /ja/google-sheets-gas-workflow
- /ja/payment-notification-workflow
- /ja/ai-administration-governance

Core concepts: administrative DX, budget workflow, audit trail, payment notification, Google Sheets + GAS workflow, AI administration governance, human review for policy and tax topics.
